DP.432.0000:
You know how you can catch Pokémon
in the trophy garden?\f
If you put this on a caught Pokémon,
it warms up to you faster.\f
I’ll share one with you, so give it
a try.\f
DP.432.0001:
I hope you become a Trainer that
Pokémon can love and trust.
DP.432.0002:
I’m not loafing off.
I’m just taking a personal break.
